title: Metagenomics of germfree Olfactory receptor 56-deficient and WT mice transplanted with fecal matter from female SPF mice and of untransplanted SPF mice
author: Pedroso, Dora
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Metagenomics (16S-V4 region) of Olfactory receptor 56-deficient and WT male and female germfree mice transplanted with fecal matter from female SPF mice. Amplicon sequencing of genomic DNA samples from large and small intestine of those germfree mice was performed using the Earth Microbiome Protocol, for the V4 region and using the primer pair 515F-806R.
steps_raw: Metagenomics (16S-V4 region) of Olfactory receptor 56-deficient and WT male and female germfree mice transplanted with fecal matter from female SPF mice. Amplicon sequencing of genomic DNA samples from large and small intestine of those germfree mice was performed using the Earth Microbiome Protocol, for the V4 region and using the primer pair 515F-806R.
